{{Infobox construct
| name = Jadeclaw Rings
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jadeclaw Rings]] are constructs used by [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan]] possesses [[Jadeclaw Rings]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] had seven [[Jadeclaw Rings]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
